primary.name: Konekt Navy
primary.usage: Primary buttons, headers, active states, text emphasis

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:shadow-primary/30 hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary/10 hover:border-primary/30 hover:bg-primary/5 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-200
buttons.accent: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all

cards.product: group relative bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:border-primary/20 hover:shadow-xl
cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 p-6 shadow-sm
cards.feature: bg-slate-50/50 rounded-2xl p-8 border border-slate-100 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: h-11 rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all

marketing.hero: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center min-h-[80vh] px-6 lg:px-12

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 hidden lg:block

instructions_to_main_agent: UPDATE /app/frontend/src/index.css: Replace the root color variables with the new Navy (#2D3E50) and Gold (#D4A843) palette. Ensure HSL values are correct.
UPDATE /app/frontend/src/index.css: Remove 'card-brutalist' and replace with 'card-modern' using the shadow/border styles defined in visual_enhancers.
UPDATE /app/frontend/src/App.css: Refine .hero-section to use the new gradient and layout.
Ensure all buttons use the new 'pill' shape and shadow styles.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard and feature sections.
Use the provided image URLs for the product catalog and hero section.
Maintain the 'Space Grotesk' font for headings but ensure 'Outfit' is used for all body text.
Gamification elements (points, badges) should use the metallic gradient styles defined in colors.gamification.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-8, p-12).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
